name: Wicker Dome Pendant with Opal Glass Ball Ceiling Light Brown - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Rattan Chandelier, ETL Listed
description:
Illuminate your indoor space while keeping your aesthetic on point with this Wicker Dome Pendant with Opal Glass Ball Ceiling Light from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. The ceiling light showcases a wicker dome pendant with an opal glass ball to illuminate your space in style. This shaded chandelier features an adjustable hanging height to fit your space, and it lights up with a one-way light setting for easy operation. Install it above your dining room table or living room to cast a welcoming glow over family dinners or casual get-togethers.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
